calendar.matters:
CONTESTED NAME CHANGE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: A petition for name change filed by Soumia Cenbod is before the Court today

Dept 514; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" (FTR) Commencing at 09:38:24, Ending at 09:40:57

The Court reviews materials filed by the Court and GRANTS the Request to Change Name without fiving further notice to other parent.

Order signed and filed; endorsed copy given to the Petitioner.

CONTESTED NAME CHANGE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Dec-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CONTESTED NAME CHANGE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Continued To Oct-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for name change filed by Soumia Chenbod.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:45:09 a.m. and concluding at 09:50:19 a.m.

Petitioner Soumia Chenbod appearing in pro per.

Court determines there is no objecting party.
Plaintiff's request to continue is GRANTED.

Petitioner to provide proof of publication.
Court orders matter continued to Oct-27-2022 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 514 for further hearing on petition for name of change.

Contested Name Change
Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Continued To Sep-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for contested hearing on the proposed Name Change of the minor from Sophia Fatima Chenbod Laurencio to Fatima Rose Chenbod Atik.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:24 a.m., adjourning at 10:27 a.m., and reconvening at 10:30 a.m. and concluding at 10:42 a.m.

Petitioner/Mother Soumia Chenbod was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Laurence Laurencio, Father/Objecting party, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Pubilcation on file.

Petitioner Soumia Chenbod submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: San Francisco Superior Court - Family Court Services' Tier 2 Report........ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: DNA Diagnostics Center's DNA Test Report...................................ID/EVID

Laurence Laurencio, objecting party and putative father, withdraws his objection to the proposed name change, as according to the results of DNA Diagnostics Center's DNA Test, he (Mr. Laurencio) has 0% probability of being the biological father of the minor, Sophia Fatima Chenbod Laurencio.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 22, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for further hearing and in order for petitioner to provide the biological father with notice of the proposed name change.

Proceedings concluded at 10:42 a.m.
